race.comment: POWERFUL TUNE (9) unwanted in betting on debut ($10), when she led all the way to score a slick win over 1007m at this track in the heavy going. Should come on following that run and gets her chance in this winnable race. YOUWROTEUPONIT (2) has won previously first-up and resumes after a break of five months. Now in the Cassandra Schmidt yard after finishing a close-up fourth over 1200m at Seymour in BM62 grade last December. Back without a trial and has a host of gear changes. SIRSA NUWA (7) returns from 62-day let-up. Demolished inferior opposition when scoring by 5 lens as fav over 1200m at Port Macquarie. Back in trip and not to be underestimated. KISSAVOS (4) created a big impression fourth-up when ploughing through the heavy (8) going to get off the mark over this track and trip. Key jockey change and will take stopping.
